name: Grilled Mullet
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the fillets in a flat pan and squeeze lime juice over them.
2. Refrigerate for 4 hours to tenderize the fish.
3. When ready to cook, place the fillets on an oiled grill over hot coals.
4. Brush with butter and season with salt and pepper.
5. Baste frequently with butter as the fish browns.
